REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1200 Gough Street, E13 S.F. Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $400,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
